title: Custom Skyboxes
description: Custom Skyboxes is a mod that allows you to change the sky, clouds, sun, moon, rain, snow, and stars in real time with a texture or GIF with Commands!
body:
![Custom Night Sky](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e27d131e8b36ae7b6167ddf237bde358d6550402_0.webp)

## Base Command

`/customskyboxes <set/biome/reload/clear>`

This mod allows you to fully customize the Minecraft sky in real time using textures or animated GIFs stored inside a resource pack.
You can individually replace the sky, sun, moon, clouds, rain, snow, and more for unique visual experiences.

To apply CustomSkyboxes effects to other players, use:
[Client Execution Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/client-execution)

---

## Resource Pack Folder Structure

```txt
assets/customskyboxes

customskyboxes/
├── sun
├── moon
├── night_sky
├── day_sky
├── sky
├── clouds
├── rain
└── snow
```

![folders](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/64d5489da8fec1693ccd94c2dd736872d35bfb4c.png)

---

# Why Use CustomSkyboxes?

CustomSkyboxes is perfect for Minecraft map makers, server developers, and content creators who want to create immersive environments and cinematic effects.

With real-time sky customization, you can:

* Create dynamic weather and atmosphere
* Add animated skies using GIFs
* Build unique biomes and dimensions
* Improve storytelling and immersion
* Make maps feel more alive and professional
* Instantly change visuals during gameplay

Whether you're making an adventure map, horror experience, RPG server, or cinematic project, CustomSkyboxes gives you full creative control over the Minecraft sky.
